---
title: "DAA KO"
---

### Differential abundance analysis

```{r setup}
library(maaslin3)

# Source group-assignment
source("../funct.R")

# Load the TreeSummarizedExperiment object
tse <- readRDS("../../data/tse.Rds")

ko_tse <- altExp(tse, "KO")

variable <- "diet" 
formula_used <- "~ diet * intervention + (1 | id)"
```

-   Group variable: **`r variable`**
-   Formula used: **`r formula_used`**

```{r data_prep}
# Create output directory for results
output_base_dir <- "../../output/daa/daa_ko"
dir.create(output_base_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
# Keep paired cases that have both time points
paired.cases <- names(which(table(colData(ko_tse)$id) == 2))
ko_tse <- ko_tse[, ko_tse$id %in% paired.cases]
```

```{r maaslin all}
# Run Maaslin3
run_maaslin3 <- function(ko_tse) {
  # Keep only paired cases (individuals with both time points)
  paired.cases <- names(which(table(colData(ko_tse)$id) == 2))
  ko_tse <- ko_tse[, ko_tse$id %in% paired.cases]

  # Create output directory for this taxonomic level
  output_dir <- file.path(output_base_dir)
  dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

  # Run MaAsLin3
  maaslin3(
    ko_tse,
    output = output_dir,
    formula = '~ diet * intervention + (1 | id)',
    normalization = 'TSS',
    transform = 'LOG',
    augment = TRUE,
    standardize = FALSE,
    median_comparison_abundance = FALSE,
    median_comparison_prevalence = FALSE,
    max_pngs = 100,
    verbosity = "WARN"
  )
}
```

```{r print_table}
#| label: table-of-significant-results
file_path <- file.path("../../output/daa/daa_ko/significant_results.tsv")
total_features <- nrow(ko_tse)

# Run Maaslin3 only if the file doesn't exist
if (!file.exists(file_path)) {
run_maaslin3(ko_tse)
}

 if (file.exists(file_path)) {
    daa_tab <- read_tsv(file_path, col_names = TRUE)
    daa_tab <- daa_tab %>%
        filter(!is.na(feature)) %>%
        select(feature, metadata, value, coef, qval_individual, qval_joint, model)
    if (knitr::is_html_output()) {
      datatable(
          daa_tab,
          options = list(
            pageLength = 6,
            dom = 'Bfrtip'
          ),
          caption = "Table of significant features",
          rownames = FALSE
      ) %>%
        formatSignif(columns = c("qval_joint"), digits = 3)
    } else {
      library(kableExtra)
      daa_tab %>% 
        mutate(
          across(where(is.numeric), ~round(., 3)),
          feature = ifelse(nchar(feature) > 8, 
                         paste0(substr(feature, 1, 8), "..."), 
                         feature)
          #p.adj = signif(p.adj, 3)
        ) %>%
        kbl(caption = "Table of significant features",
            booktabs = TRUE,
            longtable = TRUE,
            align = c('l', 'r', 'r', 'r', 'r', 'r', 'r')) %>%
        kable_styling(latex_options = "repeat_header") %>%
        row_spec(0, bold = TRUE)
    }
} else {
    return(NULL)
  }


```

```{r print results}
png_files <- list.files(output_base_dir, pattern = "\\.png$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
```

![fig38](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/summary_plot.png)

![1](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_K06206_linear.png)\
![2](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K00194_logistic.png)\
![3](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K00425_logistic.png)\
![4](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K00575_logistic.png)\
![5](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K01089_logistic.png)\
![6](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K01179_logistic.png)\
![7](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K01224_logistic.png)\
![8](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K01438_logistic.png)\
![9](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K01551_logistic.png)\
![10](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K01661_logistic.png)\
![11](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K02002_logistic.png)\
![12](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K02065_logistic.png)\
![13](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K02081_logistic.png)\
![14](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K02300_logistic.png)\
![15](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K02413_logistic.png)\
![16](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K02418_logistic.png)\
![17](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K02445_logistic.png)\
![18](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K02773_logistic.png)\
![19](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K02783_logistic.png)\
![20](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K03281_logistic.png)\
![21](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K03327_logistic.png)\
![22](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K03389_logistic.png)\
![23](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K03735_logistic.png)\
![24](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K03931_logistic.png)\
![25](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K04092_logistic.png)\
![26](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K04518_logistic.png)\
![27](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K05879_logistic.png)\
![28](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K06042_logistic.png)\
![29](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K06143_logistic.png)\
![30](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K06864_logistic.png)\
![31](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K06952_logistic.png)\
![32](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K06956_logistic.png)\
![33](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K06970_logistic.png)\
![34](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K07048_logistic.png)\
![35](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K07273_logistic.png)\
![36](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K07277_logistic.png)\
![37](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K07341_logistic.png)\
![38](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K08223_logistic.png)\
![39](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K08307_logistic.png)\
![40](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K09124_logistic.png)\
![41](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K09692_logistic.png)\
![42](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K09767_logistic.png) ![43](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K12452_logistic.png) ![44](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K13787_logistic.png)\
![45](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K17836_logistic.png)\
![46](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K18889_logistic.png)\
![47](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K19508_logistic.png)\
![48](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K20116_logistic.png)\
![49](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K20117_logistic.png)\
![50](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K20118_logistic.png)\
![51](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K23003_logistic.png)\
![52](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K23004_logistic.png)\
![53](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K00194_logistic.png)\
![54](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K00324_logistic.png)\
![55](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K00349_logistic.png)\
![56](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K00872_logistic.png)\
![57](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K01179_logistic.png)\
![58](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K01205_logistic.png)\
![59](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K01551_logistic.png)\
![60](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K01719_logistic.png)\
![61](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K01787_logistic.png)\
![62](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K02081_logistic.png)\
![63](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K02221_logistic.png)\
![64](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K02300_logistic.png)\
![65](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K02396_logistic.png)\
![66](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K02782_logistic.png)\
![67](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K03473_logistic.png)\
![68](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K03592_logistic.png)\
![69](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K03727_logistic.png)\
![70](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K04092_logistic.png)\
![71](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K05346_logistic.png)\
![72](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K05516_logistic.png)\
![73](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K06952_logistic.png)\
![74](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K06970_logistic.png)\
![75](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K07221_logistic.png)\
![76](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K07259_logistic.png)\
![77](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K07273_logistic.png)\
![78](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K07341_logistic.png)\
![79](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K07588_logistic.png)\
![80](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K08678_logistic.png)\
![81](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K09384_logistic.png)\
![82](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K09474_logistic.png)\
![83](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K09706_logistic.png)\
![84](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K10008_logistic.png)\
![85](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K12452_logistic.png)\
![86](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K13527_logistic.png)\
![87](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K13787_logistic.png)\
![88](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K15372_logistic.png)\
![89](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K16927_logistic.png)\
![90](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K17331_logistic.png)\
![91](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K17836_logistic.png)\
![92](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K18205_logistic.png)\
![93](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K18330_logistic.png)\
![94](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K18928_logistic.png)\
![95](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K19052_logistic.png)\
![96](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K20116_logistic.png)\
![97](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K20117_logistic.png)\
![98](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K20118_logistic.png)\
![99](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K23003_logistic.png)\
![100](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/intervention/logistic/intervention_K23004_logistic.png)
